column1: Hey Sydnie Pergament, thanks for your interest in rolling with us at SpringBreak U. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text you in a few to get you squared away with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy here with SpringBreak U
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options for that week
Anywhere between feb 26-march 8th we can go for like five days
Which destination were we lookin at?
Yea def. How many ppl do we have in the group so far
That's perfect. Which school all from?
Okay word. We got a pretty big group from your school going to Cabo
Were you lookin for that same trip or did you want to see a few options?
Yea no prob. We lookin for a chill vibe or more of a party vibe?
Cool. I'll work on putting everything together for you rn
How soon were you lookin to get things started
Okay dope. Cool if I send through email? It's a little long for text lol
What's the best email to send to?
Just sent that over lmk if it came through
Looks great I'll discuss with my friends tmrw!
Yea no prob! Lmk if anyone has any questions. Just text me
We got some discounts running too on some of the prices you see there. Just lmk which one we wanna narrow down on
hey sydnie hows everyone feelin about the options so far?
Sorry yes we r deff interested just haven't had time to sit down and figure it out we will this week for sure
cool all good. lmk what everyones thinking. just wanna make sure my ppl get squared away!
Hey what's up how's things lookin with the group
hey Sydnie any word on what we want to do for spring break?
heyy you still lookin for help with break or you good
Hi sorry we've had a crazy few weeks I'd like to know more abt the Cancun trip
We may have more friends now like 6
Do you guys help with flights?
Hey all good. And yea we do, which airport you wanna fly out of?
Is there any rooms for 6 at the grand oasis Cancun?
For 6 people we'd have to do two rooms. Since it's an all inclusive resort the highest occupancy they allow is 4 per room
Did we want to do 4 nights or 5? Gonna look at flights rn
Okay I guess let's aim towards the 4 right now we're trying to find 2 more friends so we don't have to pay for the 2 person room
hey! okay cool ill look for flights you can grab. we can also do two rooms of 3 I can try to get the price down a few dollars so we can get y'all started
if you find two more afterward we can always adjust
heres a pretty good flight you can grab. american airlines $521 round trip https://www.google.com/travel/flights/s/kCPj5syKsaJo86pk8
Okay cool how much is it to check a bag for that flight?
Also what would the final total be for each person with that flight and 6 ppl

so Im not too sure the exact pricing on the american airlines baggage. its typically 30-50 on most airlines. if you were to go get this exact flight at the current price, and get our all inclusive spring break package, you're looking at roughly ~$1,120 per person give our take
Okay asking because some of us have free bags through delta so I'm de sting if that could be cheaper
first checked bag on american airlines is $35. roughly ~1150 few dollars more or less total per person
Okay not bad I'll let everyone know!
yea its pretty light for sure
I think we are going to do it but still waiting on a solid answer from everyone
okay bet! is it still 3 ppl?
oh perfect. so just a couple people arent sure yet?
Ya I think everyone down just trying to figure how to afford before they say yes lol
lol makes sense. Idk if the payment plan helps, but I do have that in for you so that it can space out ppls payments
yea! so we can space out the payments in $200 increments. that helps spread it out a little
Okay I think everyone is in
hey morning! cool lets do it. ill set up the reservation for you now and send over
Okay awesome is the flights on there too or how do we do that?
so the flights are separate, you'll want to grab that directly on the american airlines site to save money. its a little more expensive as a full package through us
https://www.google.com/travel/flights/s/kCPj5syKsaJo86pk8 heres the flight I recommend for reference
so you'll go here https://www.aa.com/homePage.do > book > From: DTW To: CUN > Dates: March 1 to March 5 > hit search
Great thank you so much h
OK sounds good. I will look at it after class and send it over to everyone and make sure we can get the flights and then we'll book it. Thanks for the help. I'll keep you posted.
Sounds good. heres the reservation link so you have it https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/package/J7UIUG0W5A
Okay so I still need to re new my pass port is that gonna be an issue for booking it I got a pic and all that ready to go and stuff but it wants my number and all that info
Also how much is trip insurance per person
You can skip the passport info for now! Add it on later

I've seen insurance range from $30 to $100, depends on your specific package size, state you reside in, etc. Our insurance is operated through our third party company travel insured. When you go to make your deposit you'll get prompted to add the insurance and it'll calculate your exact
It covers if you ever need to cancel. Typically up to 75% of your payments
How long would we have to cancel to get refunded. Out parents are just a little nervous because of all the political issues right now.
You can cancel at any time! I'd just make sure to add the insurance on your first payment
So that it covers the rest of your payments
hey hey, checkin in, how we lookin?
Working on getting everyone signed up
okay cool. I just put in a note for the operations team to adjust the deposit date to today
Sorry just saw this but thank you trying to get all these people to pay lol but we are doing it right now
Our friends are hard to plan lol
All good! I think I spoke with your mom not too long ago lol
Lol she was cool. But yea lmk if you need anything or anyone has questions
Sounds good thank you so much!
Okay everyone has flights waiting on the last two for rooms hopefully they can get it done today they aren't gonna take the reservation away now are they?
We should be okay, it's 2 ppl were waiting on?
They just did it so we should be all set!
Hi my friend is having trouble making a payment for some reason are u around to help at all
hey whats the trouble theyre having
Can I have her text u
im about 15 mins from knocking out lol. can she hmu rn?
lol no worries she can do it tmrw just wanted to make sure she won't have a late fee or anything
Ya I think she might've used her email to make her acc and her boyfriends so now she can only access his and not her own acc
Omg 🤦‍♀️ okay I'll tell her she's technologically challenged
Thanks I think she fell asleep now but we'll figure it out!
Yooo Syd! Lmk if you have any questions about the trip coming up
if you wanna add party passes too just lmk

Hi! I think we are good on the party passes we don't want to leave the resort thank you though! I do have one question, we saw online some people said it was hard to get water bottles at the resort, we have two people in our group that have POTS which is a medical condition that's worsened with out water specifically in the heat. We were wondering if we can possibly request to have as much extra water in our room as possible. Also another question just wanted to know how we navigate finding the shuttle when we arrive too? Thank you so much! We are excited!!!

Hey, okay yea honestly the best way to manage that is 1) let our on site staff know on arrival to resort 2) let the check in staff know during check in 3) take matters into your own hands, to be able to control it, and buy a bunch of bottled waters at the store on the resort soon as you get there
Okay me Evan Gerlach Taya pride Cody Alvey are switching to punta Cana
We are going to book that flight March 3-7
okay, go ahead and secure that flight now, I will work on the switch
The other two may switch but we didn't want to wait around for them so I will keep you posted
yea gotta make moves lol. we'll get it all sorted for you
Did you have any info on the switch yet no problem if not I'm sure you have a busy day!
Sorry to bother you late just wondering what the resort is called
Isabella Cullimore and Preston Bayus are also switching with us! We got it all figured out with the flights luckily.

hey Sydnie real quick! to finalize things we'll need each member of the group to send me an email at spiffy@springbreaku.com requesting the change from Cancun Grand Oasis 3/1 - 3/5 to Occidental Punta Cana 3/3 - 3/7
if they can do that soon as possible please. we just need it in writing as a request from each person
Got it I'll tell them rn
Evan's emailing right now. Did you get everyone else?
Do you have your new flight details?

Thank you for choosing American Airlines. Here is the itinerary you requested. Flight 1: American Airlines 2618 Departure Date: March 3, 2026 Departure Airport: GRR Scheduled Departure Time: 7:08AM Departure Terminal: -- Departure Gate: -- Arrival Airport: CLT Scheduled Arrival Time: 9:07AM Arrival Terminal: -- Arrival Gate: -- Flight 2: American Airlines 3250 Departure Date: March 3, 2026 Departure Airport: CLT Scheduled Departure Time: 10:35AM Departure Terminal: -- Departure Gate: -- Arrival Airport: PUJ Scheduled Arrival Time: 3:05PM Arrival Terminal: B Arrival Gate: -- Flight 3: American Airlines 3246 Departure Date: March 7, 2026 Departure Airport: PUJ Scheduled Departure Time: 5:40PM Departure Terminal: B Departure Gate: -- Arrival Airport: CLT Scheduled Arrival Time: 8:44PM Arrival Terminal: -- Arrival Gate: -- Flight 4: American Airlines 2686 Departure Date: March 7, 2026 Departure Airport: CLT Scheduled Departure Time: 10:44PM Departure Terminal: -- Departure Gate: -- Arrival Airport: GRR Scheduled Arrival Time: 12:41AM Arrival Terminal: -- Arrival Gate: --

That's me and Evan's we ended up having to do something different flights flights different Taya and Cody are on the same flight there but a different one home I can get hers in one sec and the bella and Preston's are completely different she will be home in a little bit I can get those too
Or I can have everyone put it in the website if that's easier
Everyone's putting it in the website, Cody messed up his arrival date tho and it won't let us fix it
Did u get everyone's flights? Also the website still has the trip dates wrong just so you know.
yup I see everyones flights in there!
Okay awesome is everything all good to go?
Hi we got an email about Cancun transportation instead of punta Cana
great catch my apologies on that
I have your old res on my email list
Hey we forgot to get our tour guides number her name is taylor anyway you would have it if not we can find her no worries!
sorry I missed this. hope y'all had a good trip tho, I'm here now but if I don't catch you before you go have a safe trip back!
